_comment: Layer 3 MULTI-LEVEL subagent fan-out (spawn depth 2), SMALLER 4-sub-question tree so the serial agent-turns fit a 20-min L4 budget (the 6-sub-q / 9-agent tree formed perfectly but timed out under --max-num-seqs 1; batched decode max_num_seqs>1 breaks DiffusionGemma's block-diffusion serving). With 4 sub-questions the prescriptive _fanout_lead_message_multilevel partitions into G=2 coordinators x 2 leaf workers (7 agents: lead + 2 coordinators + 4 leaves). Run on L4: --config configs/diffusiongemma_fanout_deep.json (max_spawn_depth 2, maxChildrenPerAgent 4, maxConcurrent 12, max-num-seqs 1) --task examples/web_research_fanout_deep.json. BRAVE_API_KEY from ~/.env.
topic: Latest stable versions (multi-level fan-out, depth 2, 4 sub-qs / 7-agent tree)
steps: the current latest stable version of Python (from python.org)
the current latest LTS version of Node.js (from nodejs.org)
the current latest stable version of Go (from go.dev)
the current latest stable version of Rust (from rust-lang.org)
